TestCases.Description: TC1: outer if TRUE, inner if TRUE — locHdl_u8=0 (< X_IcuHdl_TauDrv_Sizeof=3), IcuHdl_DigitGet returns DioDrv_Level_Low (0)
TestCases.Target: if ((u8)X_IcuHdl_TauDrv_Sizeof > locHdl_u8) TRUE; if (DioDrv_Level_Low == IcuHdl_DigitGet(...)) TRUE

TestCases.Description: TC2: outer if TRUE, inner if FALSE (else) — locHdl_u8=0 (< X_IcuHdl_TauDrv_Sizeof=3), IcuHdl_DigitGet returns 1 (not DioDrv_Level_Low)
TestCases.Target: if ((u8)X_IcuHdl_TauDrv_Sizeof > locHdl_u8) TRUE; if (DioDrv_Level_Low == IcuHdl_DigitGet(...)) FALSE → else

TestCases.Description: TC3: outer if FALSE — locHdl_u8=3 (= X_IcuHdl_TauDrv_Sizeof=3), condition 3 > 3 is false
